title: User Manual: Application Process
steps:
Step 1: Completing the Authentication Process
Explanation: Once you have entered your email address, password, and captcha code, select the LOGIN option to complete the authentication process.

Step 2: System Verification
Explanation: The system will verify your credentials and, if valid, grant you access to your account.

Step 3: Accessing the Account Dashboard
Explanation: After a successful login, you will be redirected to your account dashboard or the main application interface.
